PowerShell(Set-Location E:\\python_project\\uCloud_GetInformation; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m ucloud.cli.listener" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK - PID: $\($proc.Id\)" } else { Write-Output "FAILED - exit code: $\($proc.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell(Test-Path E:\\python_project\\uCloud_GetInformation\\.message_buffer.json; if \(Test-Path E:\\python_project\\uCloud_GetInformation\\.message_buffer.json\) { $data = Get-Content E:\\python_project\\uCloud_GetInformation\\.message_buffer.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $count = $data.Count; if \($count\) { $first = $data[0]; $last = $data[-1]; $t1 = [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds\([long]$first.time\).LocalDateTime; $t2 = [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds\([long]$last.time\).LocalDateTime; Write-Output "磁盘: $count 条"; Write-Output "最早: $t1"; Write-Output "最晚: $t2" } else { Write-Output "磁盘文件为空" } } else { Write-Output "磁盘文件不存在" })
